testcase.name: test_workflow_actions_include_apply_sla_policy

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should be a list assert False + where False = isinstance({'actions': [{'config_fields': ['role_id'], 'description': 'Automatically assign ticket to a role', 'icon': 'UserPlus', 'label': 'Auto-Assign Role', ...}, {'config_fields': ['team_id', 'user_id'], 'description': 'Forward ticket to another team/user', 'icon': 'Forward', 'label': 'Forward Ticket', ...}, {'config_fields': ['email_template', 'subject'], 'description': 'Send email to the assigned user', 'icon': 'Mail', 'label': 'Email Assigned User', ...}, {'config_fields': ['email_template', 'subject'], 'description': 'Send email to the requester', 'icon': 'Send', 'label': 'Email Requester', ...}, {'config_fields': ['status'], 'description': 'Change ticket status', 'icon': 'RefreshCw', 'label': 'Update Status', ...}, {'config_fields': ['message', 'recipients'], 'description': 'Send in-app notification', 'icon': 'Bell', 'label': 'Send Notification', ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sla_policies.py:366: in test_workflow_actions_include_apply_sla_policy assert isinstance(data, list), "Response should be a list" E AssertionError: Response should be a list E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'actions': [{'config_fields': ['role_id'], 'description': 'Automatically assign ticket to a role', 'icon': 'UserPlus', 'label': 'Auto-Assign Role', ...}, {'config_fields': ['team_id', 'user_id'], 'description': 'Forward ticket to another team/user', 'icon': 'Forward', 'label': 'Forward Ticket', ...}, {'config_fields': ['email_template', 'subject'], 'description': 'Send email to the assigned user', 'icon': 'Mail', 'label': 'Email Assigned User', ...}, {'config_fields': ['email_template', 'subject'], 'description': 'Send email to the requester', 'icon': 'Send', 'label': 'Email Requester', ...}, {'config_fields': ['status'], 'description': 'Change ticket status', 'icon': 'RefreshCw', 'label': 'Update Status', ...}, {'config_fields': ['message', 'recipients'], 'description': 'Send in-app notification', 'icon': 'Bell', 'label': 'Send Notification', ...}, ...]}, list)
